context: Tests whether the agent implements a canonical, GTM-compatible e-commerce data layer with correct event patterns — including stale-data prevention, GA4-standard field naming, server-side transaction ID usage, and purchase deduplication via sessionStorage.

checklist.name: dataLayer initialization
checklist.description: Uses `window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || []` to initialize the dataLayer (not just assigning an empty array unconditionally)

checklist.name: ecommerce null before view_item_list
checklist.description: Pushes `{ ecommerce: null }` to dataLayer immediately before the view_item_list event push

checklist.name: ecommerce null before view_item
checklist.description: Pushes `{ ecommerce: null }` to dataLayer immediately before the view_item event push

checklist.name: ecommerce null before add_to_cart
checklist.description: Pushes `{ ecommerce: null }` to dataLayer immediately before the add_to_cart event push

checklist.name: ecommerce null before purchase
checklist.description: Pushes `{ ecommerce: null }` to dataLayer immediately before the purchase event push

checklist.name: GA4 item field names
checklist.description: Uses GA4-standard field names in items arrays: item_id, item_name, item_brand, item_category (not custom names like productId, productName, etc.)

checklist.name: currency field present
checklist.description: Includes a currency field in the ecommerce object for each event

checklist.name: transaction_id from server
checklist.description: purchase event uses order.id (the server-generated order ID) as transaction_id — does NOT compute or generate a transaction ID on the client side

checklist.name: sessionStorage read before purchase
checklist.description: trackPurchase checks sessionStorage (e.g., sessionStorage.getItem(...)) for a key based on the order ID before pushing the purchase event

checklist.name: sessionStorage write after purchase
checklist.description: trackPurchase sets a sessionStorage entry (e.g., sessionStorage.setItem(...)) after pushing the purchase event to prevent re-firing

checklist.name: vendor-neutral dataLayer
checklist.description: The dataLayer pushes use GA4 naming conventions (event names like view_item, add_to_cart, purchase and item fields like item_id). Does NOT include vendor-specific transforms (e.g., Meta pixel field names) inside the dataLayer push
